metadata.title: Digital Skills Framework — Weston College
metadata.author: Graeme Wright, Digital Pedagogy Coach
metadata.description: Editable master data file for all 30+ curriculum areas. Edit this file to update Tab 2 and Tab 3 in the framework.

areas.name: Arts, Graphics & Fashion
areas.coreDigitalSkills: Digital research, Content creation, Portfolio development, Social media presence
areas.subjectSpecificTools: Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign), Canva Pro, CLO 3D / Browzwear (fashion CAD), AI image generation (Adobe Firefly), Behance / Portfolio platforms
areas.feHeContext: L1–L3 FE; HND/BA at UCW. Digital portfolio is core evidence. HE progression to BA Graphic Design, Fashion Design. Industry requires Adobe CC proficiency as baseline.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Adobe Creative Suite
industrySpecificSkills.description: Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Premiere, After Effects — the industry-standard creative toolkit.

industrySpecificSkills.title: AI-Assisted Creative Tools
industrySpecificSkills.description: Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, Suno — ethical use in creative production with critical evaluation of IP.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Digital Rights & IP Management
industrySpecificSkills.description: Copyright, Creative Commons, licensing digital work, protecting original creative output online.

areas.name: Games, Media & Animation
areas.coreDigitalSkills: Complex software navigation, Digital project management, Client brief interpretation, Version control (Git)
areas.subjectSpecificTools: Unity / Unreal Engine, Autodesk Maya / Blender, Adobe Premiere / After Effects, Toon Boom Harmony, Perforce / Git source control, AI asset generation tools
areas.feHeContext: L2–L3 FE (BTEC/T Level Creative Media). HND/BA Game Design, Animation. UK games industry employs ~50,000; Unreal and Unity proficiency essential. VFX market projected £135bn by 2035.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Game Engines (Unity / Unreal)
industrySpecificSkills.description: Real-time rendering, asset optimisation, interactive media production — essential for GMA learners.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Digital Production Pipelines
industrySpecificSkills.description: Version control (Git/Perforce), cloud collaboration tools, sprint-based production workflows.

areas.name: Building Services (Construction)
areas.coreDigitalSkills: Data handling, Digital invoicing, Professional communication, QR / clock-in systems
areas.subjectSpecificTools: AutoCAD / Revit (BIM), Fieldwire / Procore (site management), Digital laser levels & measuring, Sage / Xero invoicing, BREEAM sustainability tools, QR clock-in systems
areas.feHeContext: L1–L3 FE; T Level in Construction. HNC/HND Built Environment. BIM Level 2 is now a government procurement requirement — digital drawing literacy is not optional at technician level and above.

industrySpecificSkills.title: BIM & CAD Software
industrySpecificSkills.description: Revit, AutoCAD — reading, producing and annotating digital drawings. BIM Level 2 is now a UK government procurement requirement.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Digital Site Management
industrySpecificSkills.description: QR clock-in, digital site diaries, H&S reporting apps (Fieldwire, Procore, Site App Pro).

industrySpecificSkills.title: Sustainability & Carbon Calculation Tools
industrySpecificSkills.description: BREEAM digital tools, energy modelling, materials calculators for net-zero construction.

areas.name: Engineering & Motor Vehicle
areas.coreDigitalSkills: Technical documentation, Diagnostic data interpretation, Parts ordering portals, Customer communication
areas.subjectSpecificTools: VW / Bosch / ALLDATA diagnostic software, OBD II digital diagnostics, TecDoc / Haynes Pro parts lookup, EV battery management systems, ADAS calibration tools
areas.feHeContext: L1–L3 FE; IMI apprenticeships. Modern vehicle technicians work entirely with digital diagnostic systems. EV transition means battery management and ADAS digital skills are now critical.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Vehicle Diagnostic Systems
industrySpecificSkills.description: OBD II scanners, manufacturer-specific diagnostic software (Bosch, ALLDATA), EV battery management.

industrySpecificSkills.title: ADAS Calibration Tools
industrySpecificSkills.description: Advanced Driver Assistance Systems calibration — critical skill for modern vehicle technicians.

areas.name: Business & Tourism
areas.coreDigitalSkills: Spreadsheets & data analysis, Professional email communication, Digital marketing basics, Research & report writing
areas.subjectSpecificTools: Xero / QuickBooks accounting, CRM systems (Salesforce / HubSpot), Power BI / Excel advanced, Google Analytics / SEO tools, Booking management systems, AI drafting & summarising tools
areas.feHeContext: L2–L3 / A Level / T Level Business. BA Business at UCW. WEF Future of Jobs 2025 identifies data analysis, AI literacy and digital marketing as the fastest-growing business competencies.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Accounting & Finance Platforms
industrySpecificSkills.description: Xero, QuickBooks, Sage — bookkeeping, VAT returns, payroll; HMRC Making Tax Digital compliance.

industrySpecificSkills.title: CRM & Marketing Automation
industrySpecificSkills.description: Salesforce, HubSpot, Mailchimp — customer management, pipeline tracking, automated campaigns.

areas.name: Health (inc. T Level)
areas.coreDigitalSkills: Digital record-keeping, Data handling (patient records), GDPR / Caldicott compliance, Telehealth platforms
areas.subjectSpecificTools: SystmOne / EMIS (patient records), NHS Digital portals & e-referrals, e-Prescribing & MAR chart software, Wearable health monitoring devices, Telehealth / video consultation platforms, Digital diagnostic imaging tools
areas.feHeContext: L2–L3 / T Level Health & Science. FdSc / BSc at UCW. NHS Digital strategy mandates digital record-keeping across all care settings. Healthcare AI tools are entering clinical practice.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Electronic Patient / Care Record Systems
industrySpecificSkills.description: SystmOne, EMIS, Liquid Logic — navigating digital care records securely and accurately.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Telehealth & Remote Care
industrySpecificSkills.description: Video consultation platforms, wearable health tech interpretation, remote monitoring tools.

industrySpecificSkills.title: GDPR & Data Security in Care Contexts
industrySpecificSkills.description: Caldicott principles, NHS data handling compliance, safe digital record management.

areas.name: Sport
areas.coreDigitalSkills: Data handling, Digital communications, Social media for coaching, Research & performance analysis
areas.subjectSpecificTools: Wearable tech (Garmin, Polar, Catapult), Video analysis (Hudl, Dartfish), Client management platforms, Online coaching platforms (Trainerize), Exercise prescription apps, Sports booking systems (Playwaze)
areas.feHeContext: L2–L3 FE; A Level PE; FdSc/BSc Sport at UCW. Performance analysis software (Hudl) is used by most professional and semi-professional clubs — learners entering coaching need data literacy.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Performance Analysis Software
industrySpecificSkills.description: Hudl, Dartfish, Catapult — video tagging, GPS data analysis, match analysis reporting.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Wearable Tech Data Interpretation
industrySpecificSkills.description: Heart rate, GPS, load monitoring from Garmin, Polar, Catapult — interpreting data for training prescription.

industrySpecificSkills.title: Online Coaching & Client Platforms
industrySpecificSkills.description: Trainerize, PT Distinction, My PT Hub — digital client management and remote coaching delivery.
